questions.statement: <span style="font-weight: 700;">Directions: Select the CORRECTLY spelt word from the given alternatives.</span>

<p>In the following question, out of the given four alternatives, select the alternative which best expresses the meaning of the Idiom/Phrase.</p>

<p>Pitch and toss</p>

<p><strong>Directions: Select the antonym of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>CONCUR</p>

<p><span style=" font-weight: 700;">Direction:&nbsp;</span><span style="">Select the correct&nbsp;</span><span style="font-weight: 700; ">ANTONYM&nbsp;</span><span style="">of the given word.</span></p>

<p><strong>Deception</strong></p>
Select the word which is nearest in meaning to the word &quot;Timorous&#39;&#39; .

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>Fictitious</p>
<p><strong>In the following question, four words are given out of which one word is correctly spelt. Find the correctly spelt word.</strong></p>

<p>DIRECTIONS: A sentence with an underlined idiomatic expression is given. What is the meaning of the idiomatic expression &lsquo;Bent on doing&rsquo; in the sentence given below?</p>

<p>He was <u>bent on getting married</u> as soon as possible.&nbsp;</p>
options: to have a dislike for something /
to be determined to do or have something /

questions.statement:
<p><span style="font-weight: 700;">Choose the correct opposites of the given words.</span></p>

<p>Pass&eacute;</p>
